scenarios.title: Embedding Retrieval and RAG Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Embedding models, semantic or sparse search, reranking, vector or graph RAG, retrieval training, corpus indexing, RAG pipelines, vector database clients, and retrieval evaluation.
scenarios.role: Use FlashRAG for retrieval-augmented generation research workflows: config/data validation, retrieval and index building, generation/refinement components, RAG pipelines/method reproduction, evaluation, and WebUI setup.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `flashrag` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: data and config, evaluation and webui, generation and refinement, pipelines and methods, and retrieval and indexing.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `flashrag` when the request names `flashrag`, centers on retrieval-augmented generation research workflows: config/data validation, retrieval and index building, generation/refinement components, RAG pipelines/method reproduction, evaluation, and WebUI setup, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in embedding retrieval rag workflows. Then route to data and config, evaluation and webui, generation and refinement, or pipelines and methods when those focused workflows match.
